levels.title: Candle to Signal
levels.description: Build the foundational vocabulary.  By the end you will read any candlestick, identify a trend, find support/resistance, and interpret your first QuantGlass signal.

tracks.title: Market Foundations
tracks.description: Instruments, exchanges, sessions, order types, spreads, and liquidity — how markets actually work before any chart is read.

lessons.title: What You Can Trade: Asset Classes
lessons.summary: Stocks, ETFs, and crypto — what each instrument actually represents.

lessons.title: Exchanges and Venues
lessons.summary: Where trades actually happen, and why the venue affects your price.

lessons.title: Sessions and the Market Clock
lessons.summary: When markets are open, why it matters, and how crypto differs.

lessons.title: The Order Book, Bid, Ask, and Spread
lessons.summary: Every price you see is really two prices.

lessons.title: Order Types: Market and Limit
lessons.summary: The two fundamental orders, and what each trades away.

lessons.title: Liquidity and Volume
lessons.summary: Why size moves price, and how volume validates a move.

lessons.title: Fees and Slippage: The Round-Trip Cost
lessons.summary: Every trade pays twice — compute the true cost before counting any edge.

lessons.title: Who Is on the Other Side
lessons.summary: Market makers, institutions, algos, and you.

lessons.title: Crypto vs Equities Inside QuantGlass
lessons.summary: Same engine, two very different markets.

lessons.title: From Ticks to Candles: How OHLCV Is Made
lessons.summary: Where the engine's raw material comes from.

tracks.title: Chart Literacy
tracks.description: Read any candlestick chart: candles, trends, support/resistance, and volume.

lessons.title: Reading a Candlestick
lessons.summary: Understand the four price values that every candle encodes.

lessons.title: What Makes a Trend
lessons.summary: Learn how higher highs and lower lows define direction.

lessons.title: Support & Resistance Basics
lessons.summary: Discover the price levels where supply and demand repeatedly clash.

lessons.title: Volume as Confirmation
lessons.summary: Learn why volume gives price moves credibility.

lessons.title: Timeframes: One Market, Many Lenses
lessons.summary: The same price action looks different at 15m, 1h, 4h, and 1d.

lessons.title: Swings, Trendlines, and Structure
lessons.summary: Higher highs, higher lows, and the skeleton under every chart.

lessons.title: Gaps, Wicks, and What They Reveal
lessons.summary: The chart's punctuation marks: rejection, surprise, and absence.

lessons.title: Reading Levels Like the Engine Does
lessons.summary: From hand-drawn lines to reproducible levels.

tracks.title: Your First Signal
tracks.description: Read a QuantGlass signal end-to-end and place your first paper trade.

lessons.title: Reading Your First Signal
lessons.summary: Decode every field in a QuantGlass signal output.

lessons.summary: A calibrated score with visible inputs — not a probability of profit.

lessons.title: Freshness and Invalidation: When a Signal Dies
lessons.summary: Signals expire two ways — by time and by price.

lessons.title: Placing Your First Paper Trade
lessons.summary: From signal to simulated position, with zero dollars at risk.

lessons.title: After the Trade: Reading Your Results
lessons.summary: Positions, PnL, and the difference between outcome and decision.

tracks.title: Scam Defense
tracks.description: Recognize and refuse the scams that target new traders: fake gurus, signal sellers, phishing, and social-engineering schemes.

lessons.summary: Ten questions that filter nearly everything.

levels.title: Indicators & Risk
levels.description: Go deeper: moving averages, RSI momentum, ATR-based stop sizing, risk:reward arithmetic, and position sizing.  After this module you can calculate every number in a QuantGlass signal yourself.

tracks.description: Every built-in indicator family — moving averages, RSI, MACD, Bollinger, ATR, ADX, Donchian, Keltner — exactly as the engine computes them.
